name: Pokémon Word 2
description:
Hey hey!

This is my attempt at creating a fully open Pokémon-style RPG for everyone to enjoy—from Kanto all the way to Galar.

**Romton Dex** – lets you switch Pokémon without needing a Pokémon Center. It works like a phone and more.

There’s no fixed opening message. Just use **(OOC:)** and write what you want to do.

Use the chat memory to keep track of your Pokémon and their moves. A format like the one below helps a lot 👇

Arcanine (Male, Fire) – Lv. 89 *(level optional)*

Ability: Intimidate *(lowers opponent’s Attack on entry)*

Held Item: Sitrus Berry

Flare Blitz

Extreme Speed

Crunch

Roar

You don’t have to be a trainer—you can be a researcher, assist a professor, join a villain team, or even be a villain yourself. It’s very open, so do whatever you want.

Advice and suggestions are always welcome!

I didn’t include a starting message because it didn’t feel necessary. But you can use this if you want:

(OOC: Professor Elm is showing the starter Pokémon to {{user}} so they can begin their journey.)

☝️ Use this to create any opening you like.

If you want to include Mega Evolution, just mention that the Pokémon is holding a Mega Stone.

Lucario (Male, Fighting/Steel) – [He wears a red scarf that {{user}} gave him when he was still a Riolu. He loves the scarf.]

Ability: Inner Focus *(won’t flinch, strong mental discipline)*

Held Item: Lucarionite

Aura Sphere

Close Combat

Flash Cannon

Extreme Speed

And this is version 2, since I used the first one as a test hehe...

Also... in this world, people eat Pokémon—they gave me Remoraid meat 😓🫠 (it was actually good...)

I use proxies with GLM 4.7 and prompts. It recognizes moves, attacks, and trainers like Erika, Volkner, Giovanni, and others.

Battles can be 1v1 or 2v2.

I hope you enjoy it... or not 😅

Try not to be too weird... or be, the chat is yours.
creator: HaruFurry
